title: Tartan Army invades Boston ahead of Scotland vs. Haiti World Cup game
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Local News “The pubs are brilliant, but I don’t think anybody knows that there’s a World Cup on.
” Greg McLeod, left, and Jamie Hunter, right, lead fellow Scottish supporters in song inside Hennessy's Bar in downtown Boston on Thursday.

Erin Clark / The Boston Globe By Abby Patkin June 11, 2026 | 4:00 PM 2 minutes to read Clad in plaid and ready to party, Scottish soccer fans have officially descended upon Boston ahead of Saturday’s World Cup game against Haiti — and they’re already making quite the impression.
